/home/tianruiming/Android/Sdk/ndk/26.3.11579264/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-linux-android28 --sysroot=/home/tianruiming/Android/Sdk/ndk/26.3.11579264/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security   -O3 -DNDEBUG  -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -shared -Wl,-soname,opslib.so -o opslib.so CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/ADD/add_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/CPY/cpy_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/FLASH_ATTN_EXT/flash_attn_ext_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/GELU/gelu_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/MUL/mul_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/MUL_MAT/mul_mat_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/NORM/norm_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/PERMUTE/permute_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/RESHAPE/reshape_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/RMS_NORM/rms_norm_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/ROPE/rope_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/SCALE/scale_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/SWIGLU/swiglu_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/SWIGLU/swiglu_oai_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view1d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view2d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view3d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/VIEW/view4d_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opslib.dir/ops_jni.cpp.o  ../bin/libggml.so /home/tianruiming/Android/Sdk/ndk/26.3.11579264/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-android/21/liblog.so ../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../bin/libggml-base.so -latomic -lm
